message:
test(telemetry): add inline telemetry counter tests for 4 modules

Add telemetry tests to completion_token (10 tests), patterns (4 tests),
priority (7 tests), and rate_limit_tracker (5 tests). Covers initial zero
state, counter increments for all operations, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
